alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Any explosions heard are result of air defense systems intercepting hostile targets.

alerts.title: 7 enemy drones detected, 4 intercepted in 24 hours
alerts.description: Kuwaiti forces detected 7 enemy drones in airspace over past 24 hours, successfully intercepted and destroyed 4, while 3 fell outside threat zone

alerts.title: Kuwait intercepts 9 ballistic missiles and 4 drones
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defense systems successfully intercepted all 9 hostile ballistic missiles and 4 drones detected in Kuwaiti airspace over the past 24 hours, with no damage reported

alerts.title: Kuwait intercepts Iranian ballistic missile and 15 drones
alerts.description: Kuwait's air defense detected and destroyed 1 ballistic missile and intercepted 15 out of 25 hostile drones in past 24 hours. 8 drones fell outside threat zone, 2 targeted civilian facilities.

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Air Defense Intercepts Ballistic Missiles

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Forces Intercept Hostile Aerial Targets
alerts.description: Kuwaiti Armed Forces confronted a wave of hostile aerial targets that penetrated the country's airspace from dawn Tuesday March 10, 2026 until midnight. Air defense systems detected the targets.

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Armed Forces Intercept Hostile Aerial Targets
alerts.description: Kuwaiti Armed Forces confronted a wave of hostile aerial targets that penetrated the country's airspace from dawn Monday March 9, 2026 until midnight. Air defense systems detected the targets.
